falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (previous 200-day moving average + 10%)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this threshold would indicate bullish momentum, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and invalidating the uncertainty around a potential bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut in its next policy statement
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a drastic intervention would inject liquidity and alter market dynamics, directly refuting the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by creating a clear catalyst for price movement.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 200% of the 30-day average for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would signal a breakout or blowoff move, falsifying the 'HOLD' by proving a definitive trend reversal is underway.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
